pipeline: paper-orchestrator (5 stages: outline -> literature -> plot -> writing -> refinement)

citation_stats.verification_source: PubMed (PMIDs returned by search_articles; PMIDs recorded in note field of each .bib entry)

round_1.changes: Added Results-section roadmap paragraph to foreshadow the five complementary analyses; ensures smoother transition from Introduction to histological subsection.

round_2.changes: Tightened the opening paragraph of the Discussion; removed hedging 'first' claim, sharpened topic sentence, and re-balanced second sentence. Preserved all numeric claims verbatim.

notes.numeric_fidelity: All numbers in main.tex (means, SEMs, p-values, effect sizes, percentages, sample sizes, coordinates) are quoted verbatim from inputs/idea_summary.md and inputs/experimental_log.md. No values were generated or extrapolated by the agent.
notes.figure_fidelity: All bar values and error bars in figures 1-5 are quoted verbatim from the experimental log. Figure 4 (3D trajectory) is a qualitative schematic; its heatmap summarises the direction of statistical dissociations but does not invent new quantitative values.
notes.citations: 24 verified PubMed entries; PMIDs recorded in .bib note field. No \cite{} orphans; every cite key has a matching bib entry.
notes.structure: Single self-contained main.tex (no \input{}); intro_relwork.tex was drafted separately and then inlined into the Introduction section of main.tex.
